title: warning not disabled despite /* verilator lint_off MULTIDRIVEN */ and /* verilator lint_on MULTIDRIVEN */ around the code

features.name: lint_off MULTIDRIVEN around generate block driving signal
features.description: Code should include /* verilator lint_off MULTIDRIVEN */ and /* verilator lint_on MULTIDRIVEN */ directives placed around signal assignments inside a generate loop, where the signal is also driven by another always_ff block outside the generate

features.name: self-referential unpacked array element in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a self-referential assignment to an unpacked array element using logical NOT: signal <= !signal
features.snippet:
logic [W_CNT-1:0] o_q;
always_ff @(posedge clk) begin o_q[0] <= !o_q[0]; end

features.name: unpacked array driven by multiple always_ff blocks with async reset
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array signal driven by multiple always_ff blocks with different clocking (one posedge, one negedge) and asynchronous reset logic
